title: MCUtilitiesClient
description: Optional Client side mod for MCUtilities
body:
# MCUtilitiesClient
*A companion client-side mod for MCUtilities*

MCUtilitiesClient is an **optional client-side addon** for [MCUtilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcutilities) that enhances the gameplay experience with visual features and ease-of-use improvements. While still a **work in progress**, it currently adds keybind support and lays the groundwork for more immersive, client-side tools.

It’s fully optional—**only needed if players want client-side visual or control enhancements.**

---

## 🎮 Current Features

### 🔑 Keybind Support
- Quickly toggle MCUtilities server-side features without using commands
- Supports all vein mining modes and previews

### 🧪 WIP: Client Config GUI *(coming soon)*
- GUI to configure server-side features locally
- Reduces need to use `/veinminer` commands manually

---

## 🚧 Coming Soon

### ✨ Visual Enhancements
- HUD overlay for current vein mining mode
- Custom particle previews
- Visual indicators for Magnet and Claim system features

### 🛠️ Better UX
- Clean configuration menus
- In-game tooltips and contextual help

---

## 💬 Feedback & Suggestions

Your input shapes development!  
Have an idea or notice a bug? Open an issue, leave a comment, or reach out.  
This mod exists to make MCUtilities even more enjoyable—**for you.**
